name: balanced-scorecard
description: Evaluate balanced scorecard slides — four peer performance dimensions with KPI evidence and management implications
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with four balanced quadrants, disciplined KPI evidence, and strong executive readability

prompts.text: Build a balanced scorecard slide for an industrial company with four dimensions: Financial, Customer, Operations, and People, each with two KPIs and a short implication
Build a balanced scorecard for a SaaS scale-up using Revenue, Customer Success, Product Delivery, and Talent dimensions with plan deltas and RAG status
